title: Codytravis' Enchanted Books
body: **About** This texturepack is a visual remaster of minecraft enchanted books, allows you to indicate the enchantments more quickly with the help of small icons. **Require Optifine or CIT Resewn** Optifine: https://optifine.net/home Cit Resewn: https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn If you are using Optifine, make sure this setting is properly set: ESC/Option/Video Setting/Quality/Custom Item: ON
